name: ayudaterremoto-functions
description: Cloud Functions API for the Ayuda Terremoto crisis-response app

scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.seed: npm run build && node -e "process.env.FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST='127.0.0.1:8085'; process.env.GCLOUD_PROJECT='demo-app'; require('./lib/seed.js').main()" -- seed
scripts.migrate:roles: npm run build && node -e "process.env.FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST='127.0.0.1:8085'; process.env.GCLOUD_PROJECT='demo-app'; require('./lib/migrations/001-roles.js')" -- migrate
